name: email-mockups
description: Turn a named Diolog feature (or several) into email-ready product-mockup graphics on a Figma canvas. Reads the feature's real context — docs/marketing/product-feature-guide.md + features-build/plain/NN-*.md + the React mock UI in apps/web-design-system (web) / apps/customer-mobile + apps/investor-mobile design-system(-web) (mobile) — then builds impression-not-replica mockups that lead with the feature's payoff (a rich product-surface vignette by default, plus soft panel + peeking device, collage/overlap, phone bezel, and a website frame for actual public sites) as titled, spaced artboards in one self-contained HTML file using the live design tokens, and recreates that layout in Figma via whatever write-capable Figma MCP is connected. If no Figma MCP is present, the HTML file is the final deliverable.
